text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You’ve been approved as a moderator. Please review the community guidelines and moderator handbook when you get a moment.
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You’ve been approved as an event_helper. Glad to have you aboard—please check the event coordination guidelines when you have time.
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You’ve been approved as a mentor. Thanks for stepping up—please take a look at the mentor resources and community guidelines.
